adventure time distant lands|1|2.title: Obsidian
adventure time distant lands|1|2.summary: Marceline and Princess Bubblegum return to the Glass Kingdom and confront their rocky past while trying to stop a dangerous new threat.

adventure time distant lands|1|3.title: Together Again
adventure time distant lands|1|3.summary: Brings Finn and Jake together again, to rediscover their brotherly bond and embark on the most important adventure of their lives.

adventure time distant lands|1|4.title: Wizard City
adventure time distant lands|1|4.summary: Peppermint Butler starts over as a Wizard School student and begins to suspect that dark forces are moving through the campus.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|1.title: Fionna Campbell
adventure time fionna and cake|1|1.summary: After a disastrous morning, Fionna can't afford to take Cake to the vet, so she seeks help from an unconventional source.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|2.title: Simon Petrikov
adventure time fionna and cake|1|2.summary: Simon struggles to live as a regular human in a magical world, and considers taking desperate measures.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|3.title: Cake the Cat
adventure time fionna and cake|1|3.summary: Cake crash lands in a fantastic new world; Fionna continues her search after witnessing something impossible.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|4.title: Prismo the Wishmaster
adventure time fionna and cake|1|4.summary: Fionna, Cake, and Simon converge in a strange place to discover how they're connected.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|5.title: Destiny
adventure time fionna and cake|1|5.summary: Pursued by a powerful enemy, Fionna, Cake, and Simon venture through a lawless world in search of a magical artifact.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|6.title: The Winter King
adventure time fionna and cake|1|6.summary: Fionna and Simon discover their best selves; Marshall Lee helps Gary prepare for a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|7.title: The Star
adventure time fionna and cake|1|7.summary: Cake is recruited by a band of vampire hunters; Marshall Lee finds himself dragged back into his mother's world.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|8.title: Jerry
adventure time fionna and cake|1|8.summary: Fionna, Cake and Simon encounter old friends and enemies alike in a desolate wasteland.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|9.title: Casper & Nova
adventure time fionna and cake|1|9.summary: Fionna and Cake look toward an uncertain tomorrow and deal with an invasion; Simon finds himself spirited away.

adventure time fionna and cake|1|10.title: Cheers
adventure time fionna and cake|1|10.summary: Simon battles his demons to obtain the artifact; Fionna, Cake and their friends protect their world from the Scarab.
